impact: Advances checkbox-21 by adding a narrow, redacted lifecycle skeleton for inspection scheduling and result follow-up with user decisions, citation-backed action gates, and explicit stop gates before scheduling, official submission, upload, certification, or payment actions.
summary: Add a fixture-only inspection scheduling and result follow-up lifecycle process skeleton.
target_task: Task checkbox-21: Add a minimal inspection-scheduling-and-result-follow-up lifecycle process skeleton fixture with user decisions, citation-backed action gates, and explicit scheduling/submission stop gates from existing fixtures only.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
